hero.title: Full Stack Developer & DevSecOps Engineer
hero.subtitle: Architecting scalable cloud solutions and engineering secure, high-performance web applications. Bridging the gap between robust infrastructure and seamless user experiences.

about.label: ABOUT
about.title: Who I Am & What I Do
about.bio1: I'm a Full Stack Developer & DevSecOps Engineer specialized in building (and protecting) exceptional digital experiences. Currently, I'm focused on designing full stack websites and implementing security-first CI/CD pipelines.
about.quote: Security shouldn't be an afterthought; it needs to be engineered into the foundation of every application.
about.bio2: Outside of coding, I enjoy diving into cybersecurity, refining developer workflows, and building personal projects that challenge me creatively and technically. I’m passionate about creating software that feels intuitive, reliable, and thoughtfully engineered.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Development
fullstack.description: Building responsive, accessible, and performant web applications from database to UI.

devsecops.title: DevSecOps & Cloud
devsecops.description: Automating deployments, securing infrastructure, and managing scalable cloud resources.

securepipe.title: SecurePipe
securepipe.description: An automated CI/CD pipeline generator that injects SAST and DAST scanning tools by default for secure deployments.

cloudarch.title: CloudArch
cloudarch.description: A visual AWS infrastructure planning tool built with React and heavily leveraging AWS SDK for real-time cost estimation.

vaultguard.title: VaultGuard
vaultguard.description: Enterprise-grade secrets management UI wrapper for HashiCorp Vault, focusing on developer experience and rapid onboarding.

portfolioos.title: PortfolioOS
portfolioos.description: A terminal-inspired, highly interactive developer portfolio template built with Next.js and Framer Motion.

threatmapper.title: ThreatMapper
threatmapper.description: Open-source utility that visualizes potential threat vectors in Kubernetes clusters based on active deployments.

apishield.title: APIShield
apishield.description: Lightweight Express.js middleware package that provides advanced rate limiting and anomaly detection for REST APIs.

1.description: Led the migration of legacy monolithic architectures to secure, containerized microservices on AWS. Implemented automated vulnerability scanning in all CI/CD pipelines, reducing security incidents by 40%.

2.description: Developed robust React single-page applications supported by scalable Node.js/Express backends. Championed the adoption of TypeScript across the engineering team to improve code reliability.

3.description: Designed and optimized RESTful APIs for high-volume data processing. Managed PostgreSQL database schemas and optimized complex queries for performance.

4.description: Assisted in the development of client websites using early frontend frameworks and PHP. Gained foundational experience in web security best practices.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Let's Build Something Together
contact.subtitle: I'm currently open for new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!

success.title: Message Sent!
success.message: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
